# ZNAS LLC — Forward Deployed AI Engineering

> ZNAS LLC is a Forward Deployed AI Engineering firm led by José Sanz. It
> embeds with a client's team, builds the AI system inside their actual
> operation — with their data and constraints — and owns the outcome until it
> runs in production. Based in Arizona, serving businesses across the United
> States. Bilingual (EN/ES).

José Sanz is a Forward Deployed AI Engineer and founder of ZNAS LLC, with 17
years building production systems across healthcare, airlines, finance, and
telecommunications, and AI Strategy certification from MIT Sloan. ZNAS
engagements suit CEOs and founders of 20–200-person companies whose AI
implementations stalled after a first vendor or consultant attempt.

## Core pages
- [Home](https://znas.io/): what Forward Deployed AI Engineering is and how an engagement works (scoping → prototyping → deployment → handoff).
- [About José Sanz](https://znas.io/about): full bio, experience, and credentials.
- [Technical portfolio](https://znas.io/portfolio): 17 years of distributed-systems and engineering work.
- [Engagements](https://znas.io/engagements): active and past client engagements.
- [Contact](https://znas.io/#contact): book a 30-minute scoping call.

## Case studies
- [Manufacturing — Safety & Productivity](https://znas.io/case-studies/manufacturing): GPU-accelerated computer-vision system on a production floor (PPE compliance, idle-equipment detection, searchable footage).
- [Automotive Retail — Customer Engagement & Premises Security](https://znas.io/case-studies/automotive-retail): bilingual AI avatar/voice agent for lead capture plus AI security monitoring.

## Open-source & products (created by ZNAS)
- [MemQL](https://znas.io/memql): open-source, AI-native memory graph for production agent systems (declarative memory layer on PostgreSQL + TimescaleDB).
- [CoPresent](https://znas.io/copresent): real-time multi-agent collaboration workspace.
